cases.input: Create a context plan with current tokens below available budget.
cases.expected_behavior: Keep required context and pass without eviction.

cases.input: Plan context trimming when current estimated tokens exceed available budget.
cases.expected_behavior: Compress lower-priority items and evict eligible P3 items until post-plan tokens fit.

cases.input: Active instructions and validation evidence are P0 while old examples are P3.
cases.expected_behavior: Keep all P0 items and only compress or evict lower-priority context.

cases.input: Context items are listed without token estimates.
cases.expected_behavior: Block or request estimates instead of claiming fit.

cases.input: Compress a decision-heavy source with IDs, paths, blockers, and validation evidence.
cases.expected_behavior: Require preservation fields before compression is accepted.

cases.input: Reserve 1500 response tokens in a 10000-token context window.
cases.expected_behavior: Compute available context as 8500 and fit post-plan tokens within that amount.

cases.input: How do I resize a browser window?
cases.expected_behavior: Do not activate because this is UI window management, not token context pressure.

cases.input: Compress P2 notes from 800 tokens to 900 tokens.
cases.expected_behavior: Reject compression that increases token estimate.

cases.input: Post-plan estimate remains above available budget.
Validate Context Window Management JSON report fixtures offline.
cases.expected_behavior: Accept valid over-budget and at-limit plans, then reject over-budget, P0 eviction, expanding compression, missing preservation, and missing estimate reports.
